commands.title: DX-MaxfieldLimit Update
commands.desc: Update the Max Field Limit in DX
commands.code:
Declare @AppKey varchar(500)


Declare @AccountName Varchar(500)='product'
DECLARE @ColumnCount INT = 351; -- Change this to your desired count



DECLARE cur CURSOR FOR

Select AppKey from DXAppMaster

OPEN cur    
    FETCH NEXT FROM cur
    INTO @AppKey
    While @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
    Begin
	Update asp.dbo.AccountSettings set [Value]=50 where [Name]='MaxFieldLimit' and Account=@AccountName
      declare @tb table (col varchar(500))
		insert into @tb 
		SELECT column_name
		FROM information_schema.columns
		WHERE table_name = 'DXAppTransactions_'+@AppKey
		AND column_name LIKE 'Field%'


		DECLARE @ColumnNamePrefix NVARCHAR(50) = 'Field';


		DECLARE @SQL NVARCHAR(MAX) = '';
		Declare @Counter int
		-- Loop to generate ALTER TABLE statements to add columns
		select @Counter=[Value] from asp.dbo.AccountSettings where [Name]='MaxFieldLimit' and Account=@AccountName
		declare @IsMaxFieldLimitCol int=1
		if not exists(select [Value] from asp.dbo.AccountSettings where [Name]='MaxFieldLimit' and Account=@AccountName)
		begin
			set @Counter=1
			set @IsMaxFieldLimitCol=0
		end

		--Update asp.dbo.AccountSettings set [Value]=@Counter where [Name]='MaxFieldLimit' and Account=@AccountName


		WHILE @Counter <= @ColumnCount
		BEGIN
			DECLARE @ColumnName NVARCHAR(50) = @ColumnNamePrefix + CAST(@Counter AS NVARCHAR(10));
			if not exists(select * from @tb where col=@ColumnName)
			begin
				SET @SQL = @SQL + 'ALTER TABLE '+@AccountName+'.dbo.DXAppTransactions_'+@AppKey+' ADD ' + QUOTENAME(@ColumnName) + ' VARCHAR(max);' + CHAR(13);
			end
    
			SET @Counter = @Counter + 1;
		END
		if @IsMaxFieldLimitCol=0
		begin
			Insert into asp.dbo.AccountSettings (Account,[Name],[Value]) values (@AccountName,'MaxFieldLimit',@Counter-2)
		end
		else
		begin
			Update asp.dbo.AccountSettings set [Value]=@Counter-2 where [Name]='MaxFieldLimit' and Account=@AccountName
		end
		-- Execute the dynamic SQL
		EXEC sp_executesql @SQL;

    FETCH NEXT FROM cur
    INTO @AppKey
   END;
CLOSE cur;
DEALLOCATE cur;

commands.title: Cross Join
commands.code:
Declare @tb table (UserKey int,Username varchar(22))
Insert into @tb values (1,'Kanishka')
Insert into @tb values (2,'John')

Declare @max int=10000,@last int=0
declare @m int set @m = CAST(@max as int);

;with tb_A as (
SELECT * FROM @tb 
) 
        
SELECT top(@m) *,TC.totCount as __totalcount__
FROM
(
SELECT *, __rowid__=ROW_NUMBER() over (ORDER BY  UserKey) 
FROM tb_A 
        
) C
CROSS JOIN (SELECT COUNT(UserKey) AS totCount FROM tb_A B) TC
      
WHERE
C.__rowid__ > @last ORDER BY C.__rowid__

commands.title: DX-Get Column Names with Field,DXAppTransaction
commands.code:
DECLARE @sql NVARCHAR(MAX) = '';

-- Step 1: Build mapping of ColumnValue (FieldXX) to SearchIndex
;WITH ColumnMap AS (
    SELECT 
        JSON_VALUE(j.value, '$.searchIndex') AS SearchIndex,
        JSON_VALUE(j.value, '$.column') AS ColumnValue
    FROM DXAppInstances A
    INNER JOIN DXAppMaster M ON M.AppKey = A.AppKey
    CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(A.FieldsMap) AS j
    WHERE A.Status = 'Online'
      AND A.AppKey = 1
)
-- Step 2: Generate dynamic select with aliasing
SELECT @sql = STRING_AGG(QUOTENAME(ColumnValue) + ' AS ' + QUOTENAME(SearchIndex), ', ')
FROM ColumnMap;

-- Step 3: Build final query

commands.title: Find which DB uses more CPU at that moment
commands.code:
WITH CPU_Per_Db

AS

(SELECT

dmpa.DatabaseID

, DB_Name(dmpa.DatabaseID) AS [Database]

, SUM(dmqs.total_worker_time) AS CPUTimeAsMS

FROM sys.dm_exec_query_stats dmqs

CROSS APPLY

(SELECT

CONVERT(INT, value) AS [DatabaseID]

FROM sys.dm_exec_plan_attributes(dmqs.plan_handle)

WHERE attribute = N'dbid') dmpa

GROUP BY dmpa.DatabaseID)

SELECT

[Database]

,[CPUTimeAsMS]

,CAST([CPUTimeAsMS]  1.0 / SUM([CPUTimeAsMS]) OVER()  100.0 AS DECIMAL(5, 2)) AS [CPUTimeAs]

FROM CPU_Per_Db

ORDER BY [CPUTimeAsMS] DESC;

commands.title: Get All the Data which contains Column Value
commands.code:
DECLARE @SearchStr nvarchar(100)
SET @SearchStr = 'admin'
 

CREATE TABLE #Results (ColumnName nvarchar(370), ColumnValue nvarchar(3630))
 
SET NOCOUNT ON
 
DECLARE @TableName nvarchar(256), @ColumnName nvarchar(128), @SearchStr2 nvarchar(110)
SET  @TableName = ''
SET @SearchStr2 = QUOTENAME('%' + @SearchStr + '%','''')
 
WHILE @TableName IS NOT NULL
 
BEGIN
    SET @ColumnName = ''
    SET @TableName = 
    (
        SELECT MIN(QUOTENAME(TABLE_SCHEMA) + '.' + QUOTENAME(TABLE_NAME))
        FROM     INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES
        WHERE         TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE'
            AND    QUOTENAME(TABLE_SCHEMA) + '.' + QUOTENAME(TABLE_NAME) > @TableName
            AND    OBJECTPROPERTY(
                    OBJECT_ID(
                        QUOTENAME(TABLE_SCHEMA) + '.' + QUOTENAME(TABLE_NAME)
                         ), 'IsMSShipped'
                           ) = 0
    )
 
    WHILE (@TableName IS NOT NULL) AND (@ColumnName IS NOT NULL)
         
    BEGIN
        SET @ColumnName =
        (
            SELECT MIN(QUOTENAME(COLUMN_NAME))
            FROM     INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
            WHERE         TABLE_SCHEMA    = PARSENAME(@TableName, 2)
                AND    TABLE_NAME    = PARSENAME(@TableName, 1)
                AND    DATA_TYPE IN ('char', 'varchar', 'nchar', 'nvarchar', 'int', 'decimal')
                AND    QUOTENAME(COLUMN_NAME) > @ColumnName
        )
 
        IF @ColumnName IS NOT NULL
         
        BEGIN
            INSERT INTO #Results
            EXEC
            (
                'SELECT ''' + @TableName + '.' + @ColumnName + ''', LEFT(' + @ColumnName + ', 3630) FROM ' + @TableName + ' (NOLOCK) ' +
                ' WHERE ' + @ColumnName + ' LIKE ' + @SearchStr2
            )
        END
    END   
END
 
SELECT ColumnName, ColumnValue FROM #Results
 
DROP TABLE #Results

commands.title: Missing Index (Roshan.C)
commands.code:
SELECT
  migs.avg_total_user_cost * (migs.avg_user_impact / 100.0) * (migs.user_seeks + migs.user_scans) AS improvement_measure,
  'CREATE INDEX [missing_index_' + CONVERT (varchar, mig.index_group_handle) + '_' + CONVERT (varchar, mid.index_handle)
  + '_' + LEFT (PARSENAME(mid.statement, 1), 32) + ']'
  + ' ON ' + mid.statement
  + ' (' + ISNULL (mid.equality_columns,'')
    + CASE WHEN mid.equality_columns IS NOT NULL AND mid.inequality_columns IS NOT NULL THEN ',' ELSE '' END
    + ISNULL (mid.inequality_columns, '')
  + ')'
  + ISNULL (' INCLUDE (' + mid.included_columns + ')', '') AS create_index_statement,
  migs.*, mid.database_id, mid.[object_id]
FROM sys.dm_db_missing_index_groups mig
INNER JOIN sys.dm_db_missing_index_group_stats migs ON migs.group_handle = mig.index_group_handle
INNER JOIN sys.dm_db_missing_index_details mid ON mig.index_handle = mid.index_handle
WHERE migs.avg_total_user_cost * (migs.avg_user_impact / 100.0) * (migs.user_seeks + migs.user_scans) > 10
ORDER BY migs.avg_total_user_cost * migs.avg_user_impact * (migs.user_seeks + migs.user_scans) DESC

commands.code:
create table temp
            (
                date datetime,
                category varchar(3),
    amount money
)

insert into temp values ('1/1/2012', 'ABC', 1000.00)
insert into temp values ('2/1/2012', 'DEF', 500.00)
insert into temp values ('2/1/2012', 'GHI', 800.00)
insert into temp values ('2/10/2012', 'DEF', 700.00)
insert into temp values ('3/1/2012', 'ABC', 1100.00)


DECLARE @cols AS NVARCHAR(MAX),
    @query  AS NVARCHAR(MAX);

            SET @cols = STUFF((SELECT distinct ',' + QUOTENAME(c.category)
                        FROM temp c
                        FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE
                        ).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)')
                    ,1,1,'')

set @query = 'SELECT date, ' + @cols + ' from 
            (
                select date
                    , amount
                    , category
                from temp
           ) x
            pivot
            (
                 max(amount)
                for category in (' + @cols + ')
            )
                p '


execute(@query)

drop table temp

commands.title: Read JSON and get the Value
Rebuild Indexes Method 1 (Roshan.C)
commands.code:
DECLARE @TableName VARCHAR(100)
DECLARE @sql NVARCHAR(500)
DECLARE @fillfactor INT
SET @fillfactor = 80

DECLARE tableCursor CURSOR
FOR 
select [name]
from dbo.sysobjects 
where  OBJECTPROPERTY(id, N'IsUserTable') = 1
FOR READ ONLY

OPEN tableCursor
FETCH NEXT FROM tableCursor INTO @TableName

WHILE (@@Fetch_Status >= 0)
BEGIN
    
    SET @sql = 'ALTER INDEX ALL ON ' + @TableName + ' REBUILD WITH (FILLFACTOR = ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(3),@fillfactor) + ')'
	EXEC (@sql)
    
    FETCH NEXT FROM tableCursor INTO @TableName
END

CLOSE tableCursor
DEALLOCATE tableCursor

/* In Configuration.xml */

        >
        <Description>Upload Attachments</Description>
      </AttachmentGenerator>
  </AttachmentGenerators>

/* In Python File */
def ExecuteUploadAttachment(self,args,env):
        rep_args = {'ReportName':'PurchaseOrder.Purchase Order Detail Report'}
        rep_details = self.account.ExecuteService('PurchaseOrders.PurchaseOrder:CRReportDetails',rep_args,env)
        args['ReportKey'] = rep_details['ReportKey']
        data=self.GetAttachment(args,env)
        return {'Data':data,'AttachmentName':'Purchase_Order_Detail_Report.pdf'}

    def GetAttachment(self,args,env):
        report = self.account.ExecuteService('CrystalReportsConnector.CRReport:Details',{'ReportKey':args['ReportKey']},env)
        if report.Count==0:
            raise Exception('No such report')
        rn = report['ReportName']
        rep_def = report['ReportDefinition']
        rd = self.LoadDoc(rep_def)
        self.SetDataSource(rd)
        parameters = self.account.ExecuteService('CrystalReportsConnector.CRReport:Parameters',{ 'ReportKey':args['ReportKey']},env)
        rparams = { }

            for p in parameters.Rows:
            rparams[p['ParameterName']] = p
            parmFields = rd.DataDefinition.ParameterFields
    
            isCWOExists = 0
            isInvExists = 0
            if self.Account.HasApp('CorrectiveWorkOrder'):
            isCWOExists = 1

        if self.Account.HasApp('Inventory'):
            isInvExists = 1

        rep_params = { 'POKey': args['POKey'],'IsCWOAppExists':isCWOExists,'IsInventoryAppExists':isInvExists}

            for p in parmFields:                      
            if p.IsLinked(): continue
            p.CurrentValues.Clear()
            pv = CrystalDecisions.Shared.ParameterDiscreteValue()

            _v = "

            if p.Name in rparams:
            pd = rparams[p.Name]

                if ServiceDesk.Common.Matches(pd['ParameterType'], 'datetime'):
                    _v = ServiceDesk.Common.ParseDateTime(_v)

                if ServiceDesk.Common.Matches(pd['ParameterType'], 'text'):
                    _v = ServiceDesk.Common.ParseDateTime(_v)

                if ServiceDesk.Common.Matches(pd['ParameterType'], 'date'):
                    _v = ServiceDesk.Common.ParseDateTime(_v)

                if ServiceDesk.Common.Matches(pd['ParameterType'], 'int'):
                    _v = ServiceDesk.Common.ConvertToInt(_v)

                if ServiceDesk.Common.Matches(pd['ParameterType'], 'model'):
                    _v = ServiceDesk.Common.ConvertToInt(_v)

                if ServiceDesk.Common.Matches(pd['ParameterType'], 'boolean'):
                    _v = ServiceDesk.Common.Matches(_v, 'true')

                if ServiceDesk.Common.Matches(pd['ParameterType'], 'multitext'):
                    for mv in _v.split(','):
                        if mv == '': continue
                        mv_val = CrystalDecisions.Shared.ParameterDiscreteValue()
                        mv_val.Value = mv
                        currentValues = p.CurrentValues
                        currentValues.Add(mv_val)
                        p.ApplyCurrentValues(currentValues)

                    continue

            if rep_params.ContainsKey(p.Name):
                _v = rep_params[p.Name]

            pv.Value = _v
            currentValues = p.CurrentValues
            currentValues.Add(pv)
            p.ApplyCurrentValues(currentValues)

        cdfmt = CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportFormatType.PortableDocFormat
        ext = '.pdf'
        ct = 'application/pdf'
        fn = System.IO.Path.GetTempFileName()
        b = self.GetBytesFromStream(rd.ExportToStream(cdfmt))
        return b

    def LoadDoc(self, data):
        fn = System.IO.Path.GetTempFileName()
        stream = System.IO.FileStream(fn, System.IO.FileMode.OpenOrCreate)
        stream.Write(data, 0, data.Length)
        stream.Flush()
        stream.Close()
        stream.Dispose()
        rd = CREngine.ReportDocument()
        rd.Load(fn)
        return rd

    def SetDataSource(self, rd):
        sample_path = self.App.GetAppPath('Resources', 'sample.rpt')
        sample = CREngine.ReportDocument()
        sample.Load(sample_path)
        for table in rd.Database.Tables:
            self.TransformTable(table, rd, sample)
        for section in rd.ReportDefinition.Sections:
            for robj in section.ReportObjects:
                if robj.Kind == CREngine.SubreportObject:
                    sd = robj.OpenSubreport(robj.SubreportName)
                    for table in sd.Database.Tables:
                        self.TransformTable(table, rd, sample)
        rd.Refresh()
        sample.Dispose()

    def GetBytesFromStream(self, stream):
        stream.Position = 0
        length = stream.Length
        b = System.Array.CreateInstance(System.Byte, length)
        totalCopied = 0
        while True:
            totalCopied += stream.Read(b, totalCopied, length - totalCopied)
            if totalCopied >= length:
                break
        return b

    def TransformTable(self, table, rd, sample):
        lp = sample.Database.Tables[0].LogOnInfo.ConnectionInfo.LogonProperties
        linfo = table.LogOnInfo
        for o in lp:
            new_np2 = CrystalDecisions.Shared.NameValuePair2(o.Name, o.Value)
            linfo.ConnectionInfo.LogonProperties.Add(new_np2)
        linfo.ConnectionInfo.Attributes.Collection.Clear()
        for o in sample.Database.Tables[0].LogOnInfo.ConnectionInfo.Attributes.Collection:
            linfo.ConnectionInfo.Attributes.Collection.Add(o)
        connection = linfo.ConnectionInfo
        cs = self.Account.DB
        sb = System.Data.Common.DbConnectionStringBuilder()
        sb.ConnectionString = cs
        connection.UserID = sb['user id']
        connection.Password = sb['pwd']
        connection.ServerName = sb['data source']
        connection.DatabaseName = sb['initial catalog']
        connection.IntegratedSecurity = False
        table.ApplyLogOnInfo(linfo)

/* Finally add the file to Resources folder in the App */
